description: In the present, the team enters the Russian mine, discovering the remains of the SVR agents and evidence of Ivanov's twisted message. Coulson answers a ringing phone and is taunted by Ivanov, who blames Coulson for his comrades' deaths. The psychological manipulation sets the tone for the episode's escalating conflict.

transcript.line: Agent Coulson, I presume. Do you know who I am?
The sick son of a bitch who kidnapped my people and seems to have more than a few skeletons in his closet?
Do you not recognize these men?
Yes, you should. Because you had them killed.
